description_long: This sculpture features a highly detailed, expressive male head with a prominent beard emerging from an abstract, organic base that resembles weathered wood or stone. The head is rendered with deep-set eyes, furrowed brows, and textured hair, giving it a lifelike and contemplative appearance. The base is irregular, full of flowing curves, hollows, and naturalistic voids, creating a sense of movement and erosion. The surface has a polished, glossy finish, enhancing the rich brown coloration and highlighting the intricate textures. The back and sides of the sculpture reveal more of the abstract, hollowed-out form, with no additional figurative elements. The overall impression is of a fusion between natural forms and human portraiture, likely intended as a public art piece or park installation.
description: A polished, brown sculpture of a bearded male head emerging from an abstract, hollowed organic base with flowing curves and voids. The surface is glossy and detailed, blending lifelike portraiture with natural forms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the expressive male head and beard emerging from the abstract, hollowed base, with the most facial detail visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated, flowing curves of the base and the profile of the head, with visible hollows and surface texture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the abstract, organic base with multiple large voids and no visible facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head and beard, as well as the undulating, hollowed structure of the base.
attribute_subject_matter: bearded male head emerging from abstract organic forms
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is neutral and does not indicate a specific setting.

license_info.creator_display_name: HUNNU Intangible Cultural Heritage Research Center
